allow: PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest http://localhost:8080/ -UseBasicParsing; "index: $\($r.StatusCode\) \($\($r.RawContentLength\) bytes\)"; foreach \($f in @\('Telecom-Egypt-ETEL-Valuation-Model.xlsx','E-finance-EFIH-Valuation-Model.xlsx','Talaat-Moustafa-TMGH-Valuation-Model.xlsx','Elsewedy-Electric-SWDY-Valuation-Model.xlsx','Fawry-FWRY-Valuation-Model.xlsx','Cleopatra-Hospital-CLHO-Valuation-Model.xlsx','Juhayna-JUFO-Valuation-Model.xlsx','Eastern-Company-EAST-Valuation-Model.xlsx','Edita-EFID-Valuation-Model.xlsx','Juhayna-JUFO-Equity-Research.pdf','Juhayna-JUFO-Equity-Research.pptx'\)\) { $h = Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:8080/models/$f" -UseBasicParsing -Method Head; "$\($h.StatusCode\) $f" })

PowerShell($deadline = \(Get-Date\).AddMinutes\(4\); do { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest 'https://ahmedwael.pages.dev/' -UseBasicParsing -Headers @{ 'Cache-Control' = 'no-cache' }; $live = $r.Content -match 'Telecom Egypt' } catch { $live = $false }; if \(-not $live\) { Start-Sleep -Seconds 20 } } until \($live -or \(Get-Date\) -gt $deadline\); if \($live\) { "LIVE: new content deployed"; \([regex]::Matches\($r.Content, '
\([^<]+\)
'\) | ForEach-Object { $_.Groups[1].Value }\) -join ' | ' } else { "STALE: still serving old version after 4 min" })

PowerShell(foreach \($f in @\('Telecom-Egypt-ETEL-Valuation-Model.xlsx','E-finance-EFIH-Valuation-Model.xlsx'\)\) { $h = Invoke-WebRequest "https://ahmedwael.pages.dev/models/$f" -UseBasicParsing -Method Head; "$\($h.StatusCode\) $\($h.Headers['Content-Length']\) bytes  $f" }; $c = \(Invoke-WebRequest 'https://ahmedwael.pages.dev/' -UseBasicParsing\).Content; "regulated by FRA.: " + \($c -match 'regulated by FRA\\.'\); "FRA and CBE: " + \($c -match 'regulated by FRA and CBE'\); "nine EGX-listed: " + \($c -match 'nine EGX-listed companies'\); "seven EGX-listed: " + \($c -match 'seven EGX-listed'\); "data-target=9: " + \($c -match 'data-target="9"'\); "Capital IQ: " + \($c -match 'Capital IQ'\); "model-badge: " + \($c -match 'model-badge'\); "research pdf link: " + \($c -match 'Juhayna-JUFO-Equity-Research\\.pdf'\))
